reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, baños impecables, servicios y shop muy bien atendido. Se puede pagar con la app y todos los medios de pago. Todo el personal muy amable. Muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, spotless restrooms, and a well-staffed shop. Payment options include the app and all other payment methods. All the staff are very friendly. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Nunca ofrecen a limpiar vidrios o controlar aceite y agua ....una vez lo solicite y el playero dijo q no podía hacerlo....en el bar la atención es muy amable

(Translated by Google)
They never offer to clean windows or check oil and water... I asked once and the attendant said he couldn't do it... the service at the bar is very friendly
